description: A big plastic airbag filled with hydrogen gas.  Provides lift if installed on a vehicle, but you'll need a propeller to do anything more than float up and down.
//: Realistically, each kg of lift would take about a cubic meter but that's literally the tile volume limit and we'd need 30 of those, so stick to a value actually allowed to exist.

description: A steel propeller and spinner from an airplane.  When attached to a vehicle, engine power will provide lift to any installed wings, allowing it to take off.
A wooden propeller and spinner from an airplane.  When attached to a vehicle, engine power will provide lift to any installed wings, allowing it to take off.
A light, flammable gas compressed for use as fuel.  Requires a lot of energy to produce, even moreso without pre-cataclysm industry.  Quite energy dense, though not very volume-efficient.
//: 25 kg per cubic meter, in the lower half of the range for compressed hydrogen.

description: A wooden mast with sails fit for a yacht or sloop, and about as much rigging as a single sailor can handle.
//: About half the weight and volume of the wooden beam, assumes a good amount is lost in the recipe
